arm_R.note: REPORTING-ONLY (no statistical gate, C4): wrong-cascade freq is at horizon N=100 vs the exact infinite-horizon e; unconditional over theta vs the theta=A-conditioned exact values (equal by the F1 symmetry gate)

bounded_learning.note: 1 - e(0) is N-INDEPENDENT by construction (no N in its formula); the majority benchmark is reporting-only (C6)
